fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's name and corporate form. For example, Inc. or Ltd.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's city.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's telephone number.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's fax number.

fields.name: Giro No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's giro number.

fields.name: Bank Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bank the company uses.

fields.name: Bank Branch No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank's branch number.

fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's bank account number.

fields.name: Payment Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's payment routing number.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's VAT registration number.

fields.name: Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's registration number. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the location to which items for the company should be shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the location to which items for the company should be shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the company's ship-to address.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code that corresponds to the company's ship-to address.

fields.name: Picture
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been set up for the company, such as a company logo.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county of the company's address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's email address.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's web site.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: IBAN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the international bank account number of your primary bank account.

fields.name: SWIFT Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the SWIFT code (international bank identifier code) of your primary bank.

fields.name: Industrial Classification
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company's industrial classification code.

fields.name: System Indicator
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use the Company Badge when you are working with different companies of Business Central.

fields.name: System Indicator Style
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to apply a certain style to the Company Badge. Having different styles on badges can make it easier to recognize the company that you are currently working with.

fields.name: Allow Blank Payment Info.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you are allowed to create a sales invoice without filling the setup fields on this FastTab.

fields.name: Contact Person
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person in your company.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: GLN
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company in connection with electronic document exchange.

fields.name: EORI Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Economic Operators Registration and Identification number that is used when you exchange information with the customs authorities due to trade into or out of the European Union.

fields.name: Use GLN in Electronic Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the GLN is used in electronic documents as a party identification number.

fields.name: Default Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a default language code to be used for e.g. printing sales and purchase documents instead of the user language.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the default responsibility center.

fields.name: Check-Avail. Period Calc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula that defines the length of the period after the planned shipment date on demand lines in which the system checks availability for the demand line in question.

fields.name: Check-Avail. Time Bucket
fields.tooltip: Specifies how frequently the system checks supply-demand events to discover if the item on the demand line is available on its shipment date.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the base calendar that you want to assign to your company.

fields.name: Cal. Convergence Time Frame
fields.tooltip: Specifies how dates based on calendar and calendar-related documents are calculated.
